This is a distinct variant from the more common 9-instance lowercase 'l' error, combining em-dash corruption with the digit error.

location_quote: N.D.C.C. § 52—01—01 (17)(a)(l) does not require Jesse Jahner

location_quote:
Galen Paul Rufus,                                        Plaintiff and Appellant

      v.
State of North Dakota,                                 Defendant and Appellee
description: In the authoritative source PDF, party names and party labels appear on the same line: 'Galen Paul Rufus,' followed by spaces and then 'Plaintiff and Appellant' on the same line; and 'State of North Dakota,' followed by spaces and then 'Defendant and Appellee' on the same line. In the database, these elements are split across separate lines with blank lines between them, and the party labels (Plaintiff and Appellant / Defendant and Appellee) precede the party names rather than following them. DB structure: lines 8 (Plaintiff and Appellant), blank, 10 (Galen Paul Rufus,), blank, 12 (v.), blank, 14 (State of North Dakota,), blank, 16 (Defendant and Appellee). Source structure: line 9 has party name and label together; line 12 has other party name and label together.
